understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to move a pushable object onto goal tiles (marked by '+' in the semantic grid), or to satisfy a winning condition as determined by the game engine (WIN status reported). This usually involved manipulating selectable pieces and blocks to reach and occupy goal positions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the currently selected piece by one cell in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls or boundaries. Pushable blocks could be moved if pushed by a selected piece, provided there was space behind them. Walls and boundaries could block movement, sometimes in complex ways that required testing. There could be multiple selectable pieces, and control could switch between them using CLICK with exact pixel/grid coordinates matching their positions.
